faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Travis homes?
faqs.answer: Travis residents most frequently encounter Indian meal moths, saw-toothed grain beetles, flour beetles, and weevils. These pests infest cereals, grains, flour, dried fruits, nuts, pet food, and other stored dry goods. Our $350-$550 service includes identification, treatment of all affected areas, and prevention strategies to keep your Travis kitchen pest-free.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pantry pest control service in Travis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day pantry pest control service throughout Travis and Staten Island. Our technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to inspect your kitchen, identify the infestation source, and begin treatment. Emergency appointments are available for severe infestations affecting multiple food storage areas.

faqs.question: What does your pantry pest control service include for the $350-$550 price?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive pantry pest service includes a thorough kitchen inspection, identification of all infested products, targeted treatment of cabinets and storage areas, pheromone traps for monitoring, crack and crevice treatment, sanitation recommendations, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. The final price depends on the severity of the infestation and the size of your Travis home.

faqs.question: How can I prevent pantry pests from returning to my Travis home?
faqs.answer: After treatment, we recommend storing all dry goods in airtight containers, regularly cleaning pantry shelves and corners, inspecting new groceries before storage, rotating older products to the front, and disposing of infested items immediately. Our technicians will provide specific prevention tips based on your kitchen layout and storage habits during service in Travis.
